title: Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-48-500W
description: Gigabit L3 PoE switch Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-48-500W in 19" rackmount design with maximum PoE power 500W . Manageable switch with 48 gigabit metallic ports + (2) Gigabit SFP ports + (2)1/10G SFP+ ports and 70Gbps total throughput Its biggest advantage is Gigabit PoE on each port, which can be set to be active PoE 802.3af/at with maximum power 34.2W/port or passive 24V with maximum power 17W/por . Automatic detection ensures full functionality of 802.3af and 802.3at devices without prior configuration. Passive 24V PoE must be set manually. Thanks to these features, one active element can be used to power all devices in your network! Compared to 24 port models, 48 port models are equipped with two SFP+ ports for uplink with 10 Gbps Designed for convenient management, the EdgeSwitch Configuration Interface allows administrators to configure and monitor switch features in a graphical user interface. The EdgeSwitch uses a sophisticated operating system that provides basic switching features, PoE configuration per port, and a variety of advanced features including: MSTP/RSTP/STP, VLAN, Link Aggregation, DHCP snooping, RADIUS, 802.1X and much more Device Rackmount screws Power cord
